title: AI News Daily — July 19, 2026
summary: The AI trade hit its roughest patch of the year: chip stocks logged their worst week since March 2025 on fears that Moonshot's cheap, powerful Kimi K3 is a 'DeepSeek moment' for US infrastructure spending, and Apple used the dip to reclaim the title of world's most valuable company from NVIDIA. Two frontier-lab safety leaders are on their way out — one over a Pentagon deal he couldn't stomach, the other in a research reorg — while Microsoft and 1Password both shipped new AI security and agent-access tools.
